# UX demo thumbnails

These fictional, AI-generated images are served only by the Node UX harness.
They give the fixture-seeded library realistic visual variety without placing
real users' saved history, profile photographs, or third-party post imagery in
public documentation.

The source images were generated for Linkosh on 2026-07-16 and reduced to
256×256 JPEGs for the fixture library. They are not copied into the extension
build.
